zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Somery於1231年出生在英國斯塔福爾杜德利時，他的父親Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley37歲，母親Nichole d'Aubigny21歲。他於1254年之前與Amabilia, de Chaucombe結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1273年之前在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利。

nameMeanings.name: Somery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Abelino, Adela, Alberto, Alfredo, Ana, Angel, Asuncion, Domingo, Elena, Emiliano, Emilio, Eusebio.
Spanish: possibly a habitational name from La Somera in Cuenca province, named from somero ‘shallow’. This surname is most common in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Somery was born in 1231, in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley, was 37 and his mother, Nichole d'Aubigny, was 21. He married Amabilia, de Chaucombe before 1254. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 1273, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, and was buried in Dudley, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Somery est né en 1231, à Dudley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Nichole d'Aubigny, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Amabilia, de Chaucombe avant 1254. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 1273, à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

Er hat vor 1254 Amabilia, de Chaucombe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 1273 in Dudley, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Dudley, Worcestershire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Someryが1231年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudleyは37歳，母Nichole d'Aubignyは21歳であった。1254年以前にAmabilia, de Chaucombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1273年以前にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーで死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Somery(이)가 1231년 영국 스태퍼드실르 드들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Nichole d'Aubigny(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1254년 이전 Amabilia, de Chaucombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1273년 이전 영국 워스스터실르 드들리에서 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 드들리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Somery родился в 1231 г. в местности дудли, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger IV de Somery Baron of Dudley было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Nichole d'Aubigny, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Amabilia, de Chaucombe перед 1254 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 1273 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия и был похоронен в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия.
